ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Requested loan amount */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Loan term in months */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "bad" INTEGER /* Indicates previous bad debts (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "month_num" INTEGER /* Month of the application */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income of the applicant */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., Personal, Mortgage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount for the loan type */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount for the loan type */,
  "min_term" INTEGER /* Minimum term for the loan type */,
  "max_term" INTEGER /* Maximum term for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_background" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "bachelor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has a Bachelor's degree */,
  "high_school_or_below" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has education High School or Below */,
  "master_or_above" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has a Master's degree or above */,
  "college" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has attended college */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university attended */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_background_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval if applicable */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if applicable */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer who processed the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_history" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the repayment */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid in the repayment */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance after repayment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was obtained */,
  "credit_agency" TEXT /* Name of the credit agency (e.g., Experian, Equifax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held at the employer */,
  "years_employed" INTEGER /* Number of years employed */,
  "monthly_salary" REAL /* Monthly salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "branch_location" TEXT /* Location of the loan officer's branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan officer */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of action taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., Application submitted, Reviewed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score assigned to the applicant */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the risk assessment model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid in the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Bank Transfer) */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee applied (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Loan Officer, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., House, Car) */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan officer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_reviews_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_reviews_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)
